accurate-laser-e150.overview: The Accurate Laser E150 is a high-speed CO2 laser cutting and engraving machine designed for large-format applications. Ideal for signage, decorative panels, acrylic letters, and woodcraft, it delivers consistent, accurate results with efficiency and reliability. Advanced technology ensures stable operation, fast production, and precise contour cutting with CCD camera guidance.

keyFeatures.title: High-Power CO2 Laser
keyFeatures.description: Delivers sharp, precise engraving and cutting across multiple substrates, including acrylic, wood, leather, and plastics. Ideal for both fine details and large-format projects.

keyFeatures.title: Large Working Area
keyFeatures.description: ~1300 × 2500 mm bed size allows handling of medium-to-large sheets, supporting industrial-scale production without sacrificing precision.

keyFeatures.title: Heavy-Duty Steel Frame
keyFeatures.description: Minimizes vibration, ensures long-term structural stability, and maintains alignment for consistent output during high-speed operation.

keyFeatures.title: CCD Camera Alignment
keyFeatures.description: Built-in camera detects contours and corrects placement, allowing accurate cutouts for irregular shapes and repeatable engraving on complex designs.

keyFeatures.title: Safety Features
keyFeatures.description: Includes protective laser housing, emergency stop, and interlocks to ensure safe operation in commercial environments.

keyFeatures.title: User-Friendly Controller
keyFeatures.description: USB and Wi-Fi connectivity with an intuitive interface compatible with LightBurn and other CNC software, making file transfer and job setup straightforward.

salesInsights.a: The Accurate Laser E150 is a 150W CO2 laser cutting and engraving machine with a 1300×2500mm working area and an integrated CCD camera system. It cuts and engraves acrylic, wood, leather, plastics, and non-metallic materials with high precision. The CCD camera reads printed contours and registration marks automatically, enabling print-and-cut workflows that are especially valuable for shaped signage panels, decorative acrylic lettering, and custom woodcraft. Operating at up to 60,000mm/min engraving speed with High-Speed DSP control, it is built for commercial businesses seeking reliable, fast, and precise laser processing at production volume.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The E150 reduces production time significantly through its CCD camera alignment, which eliminates manual marking and re-positioning between printing and cutting. Signage and fabrication businesses benefit from faster job turnaround and the ability to accept complex contour-cut orders that standard CO2 lasers without camera guidance cannot process accurately. The High-Speed DSP control with stepper motor subdivision drive maintains engraving detail at full speed. Compatibility with CorelDraw, AutoCAD, AI files, and RD Works means zero additional software investment — the machine integrates directly into existing design and pre-production workflows from day one.

The first unique quality is the CCD camera contour-cutting integration at the 150W class. Most CO2 lasers at this power level lack camera guidance, requiring manual coordinate-based cutting that is slow and error-prone on irregular shapes. The E150 brings automated contour detection to a mid-power platform, enabling shaped acrylic displays, contour-cut panel letters, and layered engraving with consistent accuracy. The second unique quality is the dual-tube CO2 glass tube architecture — engineered to support a dual-tube optical path, giving operators the flexibility to run single-tube precision engraving or switch to dual-tube maximum cutting power for thick materials, extending the machine's application range without requiring a second machine.

accurate-laser-e300.overview: The Accurate Laser E300 is an advanced CO2 laser system designed for industrial-scale engraving and cutting. With higher power output than the E150, it delivers faster production, larger-format capability, and precise performance on a wide range of materials, including acrylic, wood, leather, plastics, and metal-coated surfaces. Its robust frame, precision motion, and automated features make it ideal for high-volume manufacturing, signage, and decorative applications.

salesInsights.a: The Accurate Laser E300 is an advanced 300W CO2 laser cutting and engraving machine designed for industrial-scale production. With twice the laser power of the E150, it cuts and engraves acrylic, wood, leather, metal-coated surfaces, and engineered plastics faster and through greater thicknesses. The 1300×2500mm working area and CCD camera guidance system make it suitable for high-volume operations in signage manufacturing, industrial part cutting, and decorative fabrication where both speed and material versatility are critical. Wi-Fi, USB, and Ethernet connectivity with LightBurn and RDWorks compatibility ensures smooth integration into existing commercial workflows.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The E300's 300W output directly translates to higher production throughput — thick acrylic and wood panels cut in a single pass rather than multiple slower passes, reducing per-job time and energy consumption. For customers handling large orders of shaped signage, display components, or industrial parts, the E300 makes it economically viable to take on thick-material jobs that lower-power machines cannot complete competitively. The multi-step workflow programming feature allows engraving, scoring, and cutting to run as sequential automated operations within a single job, eliminating manual re-positioning and reducing labour time on complex, multi-layer panel designs significantly.

The first unique quality is the combination of 300W cutting power with CCD camera contour guidance at an accessible machine footprint. Most CCD-guided laser systems at 300W are large-format industrial platforms priced significantly higher. The E300 delivers commercial-grade cutting power with camera-guided precision in a standard large-format form factor, making high-power, high-accuracy laser cutting accessible to mid-volume operations. The second unique quality is its programmable multi-step workflow capability — the machine supports sequential job programming where engraving at variable depths, score cutting, and full cutting can be automated in a single operation cycle, eliminating manual intervention between steps and enabling complex layered panel production at production-line efficiency.

dlican-dl3200-rp.overview: The Dlican DLI-3200 UV Flatbed Printer delivers powerful, precise, and high-quality printing on materials like glass, wood, metal, and plastic. Using advanced UV technology, it produces vibrant, durable prints that cure instantly while reducing waste and emissions. Perfect for signage, décor, and custom products, it combines speed, quality, and sustainability in one smart machine.

keyFeatures.title: Hybrid Printing
keyFeatures.description: Supports both flatbed and roll materials.

keyFeatures.title: UV Curing
keyFeatures.description: Instant drying with durable output.

keyFeatures.description: Magnetic linear motor ensures accuracy.

keyFeatures.title: Multi-Material Support
keyFeatures.description: Works with glass, wood, plastic, and more.

salesInsights.a: The Dlican DL3200-RP is a hybrid UV printer designed to handle both flatbed rigid printing and roll-to-roll flexible media printing on a single industrial platform. With a print width of 3200mm, it is intended for customers producing signage, lightbox graphics, advertising stickers, soft membrane applications, and panel-based visual displays. It uses Konica Minolta 1024i industrial printheads together with UV-curable inks, allowing direct printing onto a wide range of substrates while curing the ink instantly during the print process. This gives the DL3200-RP the versatility to serve customers who need both rigid and roll media capability without operating two separate machines.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The machine's biggest benefit is operational flexibility. A single DL3200-RP can handle lightbox cloth, vinyl, soft membrane, and rigid panels on the same platform, reducing equipment investment and freeing floor space. The 3200mm width covers the majority of mainstream signage and advertising formats, while the Magnetic Linear Motor drive system allows stable, high-speed carriage movement with industrial-grade positional precision. Instant UV cure ensures production-ready results at high speeds, with the anti-static and automatic correction systems maintaining consistent output quality across long runs.

The first unique quality is the Magnetic Linear Motor drive system, which replaces conventional belt-driven or rack-and-pinion mechanisms with magnetic levitation technology. This eliminates physical friction from carriage movement entirely, resulting in near-silent operation, higher movement speeds, and industrial-grade positional precision — meaning no mechanical wear on drive components over time and sharper, more consistent print output even at high production speeds. The second unique quality is the scalable Konica Minolta 1024i printhead architecture: the ability to configure between 4 and 18 heads on the same machine chassis gives customers an entry-level capability that can be expanded as production requirements grow, without purchasing a new machine.

dlican-dl3200-rp.pdf: /DLICAN/DL3200-RP Industrial Hybrid Printer/DL3200-RP Industrial Hybrid Printer.pdf

dlican-dli-2513.overview: The Dlican DLI-2513 is a versatile UV flatbed printer that delivers bright, detailed, and durable prints on materials like glass, wood, acrylic, and metal. Designed with eco-friendly UV technology, it reduces energy use and waste while maintaining top-quality results. Compact, efficient, and sustainable, it makes professional printing simple.

keyFeatures.title: Auto Height Adjustment

keyFeatures.title: Eco-Friendly UV

keyFeatures.title: Multi-Material Support

salesInsights.a: The Dlican DLI-2513 is a UV flatbed printer with a working area of 2500×1300mm, powered by Ricoh Gen6 industrial printheads. It uses UV-curable inks that dry instantly under LED-UV lamps, printing vibrant, high-definition graphics directly onto almost any flat, rigid material without any pre-treatment or transfer process. Compatible substrates include acrylic, glass, wood, ceramic tiles, metal sheets, PVC, MDF, and leather, making it suitable for virtually any industry that works with rigid surfaces — including advertising, signage, digital printing, packaging, and point-of-purchase display manufacturing.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The most immediate benefit is massive material compatibility. Customers can expand their business offerings well beyond paper and vinyl to serve entirely new markets, printing directly onto architectural glass, customised furniture, ceramic tiles, and branded metal surfaces. Because UV ink cures the moment it leaves the printhead under the LED lamps, every print comes off the bed ready for immediate shipping or further fabrication, with zero drying time — dramatically speeding up job turnaround. The machine also supports white ink and varnish, which enables customers to produce high-value premium outputs: 3D embossed textures, spot-gloss finishes, and vivid prints on dark or transparent materials, all in a single print pass with no secondary process.

The first standout quality is the Magnetic Levitation drive system. Unlike conventional flatbed printers that use belt-driven or rack-and-pinion mechanisms, the DLI-2513 replaces mechanical drive components with magnetic levitation technology, eliminating physical friction entirely from the carriage movement. The result is near-silent operation, higher movement speeds, and industrial-grade positional precision with no mechanical wear on drive components over time. The second unique quality is the integrated high-precision automatic height sensor combined with an anti-collision system. The sensor detects the exact surface level of any substrate and adjusts printhead clearance accordingly — eliminating manual height setting and removing the risk of printhead crashes when switching between substrates of different thicknesses.

jhf-m5300.overview: The JHF M5300 Hybrid UV Printer combines ultra-wide performance with sustainable innovation. Capable of printing on both rigid and flexible materials up to 5 meters wide, it delivers vibrant, high-precision results for signage, decor, and industrial applications. With energy-efficient UV LED curing and reduced ink waste, the M5300 ensures powerful productivity while maintaining an eco-friendly footprint, making it perfect for businesses seeking to print smarter and greener.

salesInsights.a: The JHF M5300 is an ultra-wide industrial hybrid UV printer designed for high-capacity production, capable of printing at widths up to 5000 mm. It uses industrial-grade Konica Minolta or Kyocera printheads to produce high-resolution graphics on an exceptionally broad range of flexible materials, including flexible films, 3P cloth, fabric, wallpaper, leather, banners, and canvas. What makes the M5300 distinctive is its hybrid capability: it functions as both a roll-to-roll printer for flexible media and a flatbed printer for rigid substrates, combining two machine types into a single industrial platform. It is designed specifically for businesses that need to run large-scale continuous production across diverse material types without the operational complexity of managing two separate machines.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The most commercially significant benefit of the M5300 is its ability to print three separate 1.5-metre-wide rolls simultaneously. This means customers can run multiple different jobs at the same time — for example, three different client orders on three different media types — without any machine changeover between them. The reduction in production time is substantial, and for businesses fulfilling large-scale orders, this multi-roll capability alone can transform throughput economics. The production speed of the M5300 is considerably faster than standard wide-format printers, and the combination of the Magnetic Levitation linear motor and the electronic negative pressure ink system ensures that this speed does not come at the cost of print quality or machine stability.

The first unique quality is the Super Roll-to-Roll function — the ability to simultaneously print three independent rolls of 1.5-metre-wide materials in a single operation. This is not simply a wide machine that happens to fit three rolls side by side; it is a purpose-designed production system where each roll can carry a different media type and a different job, giving customers simultaneous multi-job production capability that is simply not available on standard wide-format printers. The second unique quality is the Linear Motor Maglev system for X-direction carriage driving, using magnetic levitation technology to eliminate friction and mechanical wear entirely. The result is high-speed carriage movement that maintains precision over a much longer operational lifespan than conventional drive systems, with lower mechanical maintenance requirements.

jhf-m5300.pdf: /JHF/JHF M5300/JHF M5300 Industrial Hybrid KM Series .pdf

jhf-r9000pro.overview: The JHF R9000 redefines ultra-wide industrial printing with unmatched speed, precision, and intelligent automation. Its dual-row, ten-color output system and 5 m multi-roll capability deliver photo-realistic results with outstanding efficiency. Featuring energy-saving UV LED curing and fully automated, unmanned operation, the R9000 offers superior performance with a sustainable edge, raising productivity and print quality to new heights.

salesInsights.a: The JHF R9000Pro is an ultra-wide industrial UV roll printer built for high-volume billboard and outdoor advertising production. Operating at 5000mm print width, it uses a dual-row Kyocera printhead array in a 16-head configuration to deliver photo-realistic output at up to 230m²/h. The machine is engineered specifically for unmanned, fully automated production — able to run multi-roll print jobs across its 5-metre bed without dedicated operator oversight throughout the entire print run.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: For customers working at billboard scale, the R9000Pro's 5-metre width is a decisive advantage, enabling seamless single-pass prints on giant outdoor graphics without joins or tiling. The fully automated, unattended operation capability significantly reduces labour costs for businesses running extended or overnight production shifts. The UV LED curing system produces output that is instantly weatherproof, sunproof, and scratch-resistant, ready for immediate installation with no post-processing delay. Multi-roll capability allows simultaneous production across the full 5-metre span, maximising throughput per hour.

The first unique quality is the 0.5-micron high-precision metal encoder strip combined with a Magnetic Levitation system, ensuring ultra-high printing accuracy at full production speed. The encoder measures carriage position to 0.5 microns — far finer than standard encoders — while the Maglev system eliminates mechanical vibration and friction, resulting in photo-realistic output at industrial output rates. The second unique quality is the multi-roll automatic boundary detection function, which allows the machine to detect the edges of each roll automatically, enabling intelligent layout and rapid calibration across multiple simultaneous rolls without operator intervention. Combined with LED instant curing, prints exit fully weather-resistant and ready for immediate installation.

jhf-r9000pro.pdf: /JHF/JHF R9000Pro/JHF R9000Pro Ultra-High Quality Industrial Printer.pdf

jhf-t3700.overview: The demand for automated, high-quality fabric printing is growing rapidly. Ideal for wide-format applications like soft signage and wall graphics in hotels, museums, offices, and malls, it delivers vibrant, personalized prints with precision and efficiency. Advanced technology ensures consistent color, fast production, and smooth operation, all while supporting eco-friendly, sustainable practices, making it perfect for businesses looking to stay competitive in the evolving signage and interior decoration market.

salesInsights.a: The JHF T3700 is a wide-format textile printer designed for high-speed dye sublimation and direct disperse printing on fabrics, supporting applications like banners, flags, and soft signage.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: It enables businesses to enter or scale textile printing with high efficiency, offering speeds up to 162 m²/h and integrated drying systems that streamline production workflows.

Its dual ink compatibility (dye sublimation and disperse) combined with integrated air and IR drying systems allows flexible production setups and consistent color output across various textile applications.

Equipped with advanced technology, it produces vibrant, durable prints while minimizing waste and environmental impact. Ideal for signage, decor, and custom projects, it blends speed, quality, and sustainability in a single smart solution.

salesInsights.a: The JHF V698 is a 5-metre industrial UV roll-to-roll printer designed for high-speed, large-format production on flexible media. It prints on materials such as PVC banner, PET film, vinyl, canvas, and similar substrates used in outdoor advertising, exhibition graphics, home decor, and large-scale display work. Using Konica Minolta or Kyocera printhead configurations together with UV-curable inks, the machine produces durable, vibrant prints that are instantly cured and ready for finishing or installation. Its 5-metre width allows it to handle billboard-scale applications in a single pass.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The V698 gives customers the ability to produce extra-wide outdoor and indoor graphics without tiling or panel joining, which improves visual quality and reduces finishing time. With production speeds up to 230m²/h, it supports high-throughput commercial operations while maintaining industrial print quality. The LED UV curing system allows immediate handling of the print, cuts drying delays entirely, and supports output that is waterproof, scratch-resistant, and suitable for demanding display environments. For print businesses working on banners, wall graphics, backlit displays, or premium exhibition output, the V698 increases both capacity and product range.

The first unique quality is its combination of 5-metre width with white ink and multilayer printing capability. This allows customers to move beyond standard billboard production into premium applications such as backlit displays, layered window graphics, and high-impact decorative surfaces. The second unique quality is the machine's LED curing and heat-sensitive substrate compatibility, which allows stable printing on materials that would be difficult to process on conventional UV systems. Combined with automatic height adjustment and anti-collision protection, the V698 is engineered for wide-format production with both scale and material versatility.

jhf-v698.pdf: /JHF/JHF Vista V698/JHF V698 Wide Format Industrial UV Roll-to-Roll Printer.pdf

jhf-venus-10r.overview: The JHF Venus 10R sets a new benchmark in ultra-wide industrial printing with intelligent, high-speed, and precision performance. Equipped with a double-row, ten-color output system and a 5 m multi-roll design, it delivers photo-realistic prints with exceptional efficiency. Featuring fully automated, unmanned operation and energy-saving UV LED curing, the Venus 10R combines productivity, innovation, and eco-friendly technology in one powerful solution.

keyFeatures.title: Multi-Roll Printing
keyFeatures.description: Simultaneous printing of three rolls for higher productivity.

keyFeatures.title: Ultra-Wide Output
keyFeatures.description: 5m printing width with photo-realistic quality.

keyFeatures.title: High Precision System

salesInsights.a: The JHF Venus 10R is an ultra-wide industrial UV roll printer capable of simultaneous printing on multiple rolls — up to three 1.6-metre rolls at the same time — making it one of the highest-throughput wide-format printers available. It uses 20 Kyocera industrial printheads arranged in a double-row configuration to support a ten-colour ink system including CMYK, LC, LM, LY, LK, OB, WG, and PR. Prints are instantly cured using an efficient Honle LED system, making the output waterproof, sunproof, and scratch-resistant for long-term outdoor use.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The instantaneous curing capacity of the LED system allows for high-speed printing without any waiting time between printing and handling, significantly increasing overall production workflow throughput. Features such as the intelligent module, automatic boundary detection, and multi-roll material typesetting allow jobs to run as unmanned intelligent printing — the machine can operate without a dedicated operator throughout the entire print run, reducing labour costs for businesses running extended or overnight shifts. The 10-colour and 8-colour printing options give customers significant flexibility, and the extended colours — including orange-blue, white-grey, and photo red channels — allow customers to offer higher-end output that standard 4-colour CMYK printers simply cannot achieve, opening premium market segments in photography printing, fine art reproduction, and high-specification signage.

The first unique quality is the 0.5-micron high-precision metal encoder strip combined with a Magnetic Levitation system, ensuring ultra-high printing accuracy at high speeds. The encoder measures carriage position to 0.5 microns while the Maglev system eliminates mechanical vibration and friction — the core reason the Venus 10R achieves photo-realistic print quality at industrial output rates. The second unique quality is the multi-roll automatic boundary detection function, which detects the edges of each individual roll automatically, enabling intelligent layout and rapid calibration across multiple simultaneous rolls without operator intervention. This, combined with the Honle LED instant curing system, means prints exit the machine fully cured, weather-resistant, and ready for immediate installation.

jhf-venus-33x.overview: The JHF Venus 33X is a 3.2 m ultra-high-end hybrid UV printer designed for both roll and sheet printing. With dual-roll and multi-sheet capability, it delivers exceptional productivity and precision. Featuring intelligent edge detection, automatic media handling, and an energy-efficient German Honle curing system, the Venus 33X combines high performance with eco-friendly operation, empowering businesses to achieve greater efficiency and sustainable growth.

keyFeatures.title: Dual Roll Capability

keyFeatures.title: Automatic Edge Detection

salesInsights.a: The JHF Venus 33X is a hybrid UV printer capable of printing on both rigid sheets and flexible rolls from a single machine. It features a 3.2-metre printing width and can simultaneously handle two 1.6-metre rolls, giving it significant multi-job production capability. The machine uses high-efficiency UV ink solidification powered by a German-imported Honle UV mercury lamp system, which cures ink instantly on contact with the substrate. It is designed for customers who need the versatility of both roll and flatbed output without investing in two separate machines.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The primary benefit of the Venus 33X is production flexibility. A customer can print rigid boards for signage, display panels, or packaging prototypes, then switch to flexible roll media such as vinyl or film without changing machine platforms. The ability to print two rolls simultaneously reduces idle time and increases throughput on standard signage jobs. Because the UV ink cures immediately, jobs move straight into finishing or installation, cutting turnaround times. The hybrid format also makes the machine especially valuable for print businesses that serve mixed markets and cannot justify dedicating one machine purely to rigid work and another purely to roll production.

The first unique quality is its true hybrid architecture with simultaneous dual-roll capability. Many hybrid printers can switch between rigid and roll media, but few are configured to manage two 1.6-metre rolls simultaneously while still maintaining rigid board capability on the same chassis. The second unique quality is the German Honle curing system combined with automated positioning and edge detection, which gives the machine very stable curing performance and highly efficient media handling. This combination allows industrial-grade output consistency across both rigid and flexible applications, which is essential for production environments handling mixed material jobs daily.

jhf-venus-33x.pdf: /JHF/JHF Venus 33x/JHF Venus 33x Industrial Hybrid UV Printer.pdf

jhf-venus-33x-s.overview: The JHF Venus 33X-S is a high-speed automatic printer with full-process automation loading, printing, and unloading boosting production efficiency. It prints 4 sheets simultaneously, handles rigid substrates like cardboard and PVC, and delivers vibrant colors with industrial-grade print heads and precise ink control. Its intelligent, easy-to-use system makes printing faster, more efficient, and eco-friendly.

keyFeatures.title: Intelligent Safety System

salesInsights.a: The JHF Venus 33X-S is a high-speed industrial printer designed for fully automated loading, printing, and unloading of rigid sheets. It is engineered for mass-production environments where large quantities of flat materials such as cardboard, PVC, acrylic, wood, and metal sheets need to be printed continuously with minimal human intervention. The machine supports simultaneous multi-sheet production — printing up to four sheets at once — and uses industrial print technology to deliver fast, high-colour, large-format output suitable for signage, indoor graphics, industrial decoration, and reflective film applications.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: Its greatest commercial benefit is labour reduction through full-process automation. Traditional flatbed production often requires manual loading and unloading, which slows down throughput and introduces alignment inconsistency. The Venus 33X-S automates the entire cycle, which dramatically increases productivity and allows customers to scale output without scaling manpower proportionally. Printing four sheets simultaneously also shortens production time per batch, making it especially valuable for customers producing large numbers of standardised display boards, signage panels, or industrial printed sheets. The consistent automated positioning also improves repeatability and reduces operator error.

The first unique quality is the fully integrated automatic loading, printing, and unloading workflow. This is not simply a printer with feeder assistance; it is a complete automated production system designed to reduce manual handling almost entirely. The second unique quality is its simultaneous four-sheet printing capability, which makes it fundamentally different from conventional flatbed systems that process one board at a time. This multi-sheet architecture transforms the machine from a print device into a production-line platform, especially for repeatable rigid-panel applications where speed, consistency, and reduced labour dependency are the primary buying drivers.

jhf-v398.overview: The JHF V398 is a high-speed, 3.2 m wide-format roll-to-roll UV printer that sets a new benchmark for UV inkjet performance. It combines exceptional print quality for POP displays with the speed and reliability needed for large indoor and outdoor billboards. Designed for efficiency and versatility, the V398 supports a wide range of commercial applications from exhibition graphics and digital textiles to billboard signage. With energy-saving UV curing technology and reduced ink waste, it delivers outstanding results while maintaining eco-friendly operation.

keyFeatures.title: Vacuum Table
keyFeatures.description: Improves material stability during printing.

keyFeatures.title: Heat-Sensitive Printing
keyFeatures.description: LED curing allows printing on delicate materials.

keyFeatures.title: Auto Height Adjustment
keyFeatures.description: Automatically adjusts carriage height.

keyFeatures.title: White Ink Support
keyFeatures.description: Supports multi-layer white ink printing.

keyFeatures.title: Anti-Collision System
keyFeatures.description: Prevents damage to print heads.

salesInsights.a: The JHF V398 is a 3.2-metre-wide industrial UV roll-to-roll printer designed for high-speed commercial print production on flexible media. It is built primarily for applications such as PVC banners, PET film, canvas, vinyl, exhibition graphics, backlit displays, and car decals. The machine uses LED UV curing technology, which enables instant ink curing during printing, allowing finished output to emerge dry, durable, and ready for immediate use. With speeds up to 230m²/h, it is positioned as a production machine for businesses handling continuous large-format output rather than short-run specialty printing.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: The V398 benefits customers by combining speed, output durability, and media flexibility in a compact wide-format platform. The LED curing system means the machine can print on heat-sensitive media that would distort or damage under conventional high-temperature curing, expanding the range of materials customers can profitably offer. Output is immediately dry, waterproof, scratch-resistant, and suitable for both indoor and outdoor installation, which shortens turnaround time and removes the need for drying racks or delayed finishing. For businesses focused on exhibitions, outdoor advertising, or high-volume signage, the V398 provides industrial throughput without requiring the floor space or power load of a 5-metre machine.

The first unique quality is the LED-UV curing architecture combined with optional industrial-grade KJ4A-RH printheads, which gives the machine a rare balance between high-speed production and material sensitivity. The second unique quality is its support for white ink and multilayer output on a roll-to-roll platform. This enables premium applications such as backlit displays, blockout graphics, and layered prints on transparent or coloured films — capabilities usually associated with more expensive speciality printers. Combined with automatic height adjustment and anti-collision protection, the V398 delivers high-end functionality in a more accessible production format.
